{{Quote|We're soldiers. We don't ask questions. We supply answers. With an entire corporate world about to sway over to the New Republic, and the New Republic unable to openly confront the Pentastar Alignment, you need someone else to fight the battle. We are that someone else.|[[Sully Tigereye]]|<ref name="Blaze of Glory (short story)">{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)}}</ref>}}
'''Red Moons''' was a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] organization led by a former [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. It was a group dedicated to liberating worlds from the [[Imperial Remnant|remnants of the Empire]]. Another common goal they had was that many members were former disgruntled members of the New Republic who wanted more done to stop the Empire. In actuality, it appeared that the Red Moons were actually a group linked specifically with the New Republic who did the work the New Republic could not publicly do, possibly a division of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]]. They owned at least one ship, the ''[[Red Moon Revenge]]'', and their base was protected by a combination of four [[Galax Viper volley gun]]s and several [[Apex Incisor Missile]]s.

==Members==
*[[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Andrephan Stormcaller]]; former Colonel in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and leader.
*[[Sully Tigereye]]; former Elite Commando with the New Republic who served under Stormcaller.
*[[Lex Kempo|Lex "Mad Vornskr" Kempo]]; former Imperial [[Scout trooper/Legends|scout trooper]] who left the Empire. Killed while on assignment on [[Gabredor III/Legends|Gabredor III]].
*[[Hugo Cutter]]; former Imperial student at the [[Imperial Engineers Academy]] who was disbarred for blowing things up; demolitions expert.
*[[Brixie Ergo]]; former med student who joined after her parents where conscripted into the [[Pentastar Alignment]].
*[[Ivey]]; specialist in "procurement".
